visuals.title: Lecture Note: Routh Array Template
visuals.caption: The note shows how the first two rows are copied directly from the denominator coefficients.

visuals.title: From Coefficients to Stability Decision
visuals.description: The Routh workflow starts with coefficient placement, moves through recursive row construction, and ends with first-column sign inspection.

visuals.title: Lecture Note: Recursive Entry Formula
visuals.caption: The next rows are generated from the two rows above using the standard Routh recursion formulas.

visuals.title: The First Column Carries the Verdict
visuals.description: All-positive first-column entries mean stability, while sign changes reveal poles outside the left half plane.
